overview: An integrative medical practice in Pittsburgh specializing in bioidentical hormone replacement therapy for conditions including menopause, andropause, thyroid dysfunction, and adrenal issues. Care delivery combines comprehensive testing (blood and saliva) with treatment plans using traditional medicine, bioidentical hormones, and nutraceuticals.
highlights: Bioidentical HRT via cream, pellets, and capsules
Blood and saliva testing for endocrine assessment
targetAudience: Patients seeking integrative medicine approaches for hormone-related conditions and endocrine dysfunction.
